title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.58 — BYPASS RESTING STATE (user: inactive too close to on): resting red cap gets a 58% warm-dark desat wash (muted brick) + 78% legend; engaged = the vivid full-red sprite latched 1px down, press-darken skipped for the red cap so on-state stays vivid. PREVIOUS: v0.4.57 — SELECTOR CAPS ARE SPRITES (user: color was right in v0.4.55, the DRAWING was wrong vs BYPASS): cap bodies now pre-rendered Blender sprites like the header caps — tilecap_304x44|149x44|124x44|92x32_2x, baked in caps mode with --capbrz 120D08 (tuned so the RENDER = the approved on-screen bronze #564B3D; gotcha: the 5200W key puts a ~#53 specular sheen floor under dark materials — Specular IOR Level cut to 0.03 to get under it). bronzeCap routes the four footprints to sprites, keeps the v0.4.55 procedural as odd-size fallback; v0.4.56 khaki + sampled-silk detour reverted (lamp hues, labels, caret, ghost back to v0.4.55). PREVIOUS: v0.4.56 — SELECTOR CAPS MATCHED TO THE RENDER (user showed v0.4.55 vs mockup side by side: caps shipped several stops too dark, glow too fuzzy — the first cut eyeballed the raw Blender MATERIAL 0x4A4238 instead of the RENDERED pixels; lesson: sample the render). Face #B6A896-#A1937F flat khaki + bevel rim, labels sampled silk #E9E4D9, lamp core #F6EBC4 hot cream with tight halo, dark ink caret, unpowered value = printed silk #DFD6BF. PREVIOUS: v0.4.55 — SELECTOR BRONZE CAPS (user: 'this should be our standard button look' after seeing the H2 caps; mockup pick B of A/B/C): every radio/selector tile (MODE, AUTO REL, MACHINE, WIDTH, TAPE, IPS, CAL, BIAS, AGE, LFO, tubes, ERAs, HARDWARE, IRON) now renders as a chunky dark-bronze pushbutton (EB::bronzeCap — cached body, top catchlight, bottom shadow, hover lift) with the VALUE text as a glowing amber dial lamp (EB::lampText — halo passes + bright core; heat rides the glow exactly as it rode the lens face; lampGreen property = green lamp for engaged toggles; lamp off = silk ghost). Central switch in drawC1SelectorTile/drawC1SelectorText kPlates branches + IronTile; ParamSlider VALUE tiles (with bars) intentionally unchanged — slider rethink is the next round. Legacy lit-lens intact behind kPlates. PREVIOUS: v0.4.54 — HEADER + TABS PHOTOREAL (mockup picks: H2 chunky pushbuttons, T1 narrow lens tabs, STAGING rename; user: legends +20%): chassis plates re-baked with H2 bezel housings at the five header slots + preset readout glass window + 64px-on-68px-pitch tab wells/bezels + STAGING silkscreen (was LIMITER — only LIMIT/AUTO LEVEL are the limiter). New caps bake mode renders the proud cream/red caps as blank alpha sprites (hdrcap_red_60|cream_36|52|64_2x) — legends live (CapButtonLAF silkBold, so HQ reads OFF/2x/4x/8x; press/latch = 1px drop + shade wash; BYPASS=red cap). Tabs: TabLensLAF backlitCap 60x16 lens faces (housing=false), selected lit amber via toggle state, AGE LFO near-dark when disabled. Preset combo under kPlates: baked window, live gold EF::silk(13) text + arrow only. ATK/REL knobs got the FREQ log-skew treatment (geometric mids 10ms/100ms). Legacy painting intact behind kPlates. PREVIOUS: v0.4.53 — FREQ KNOB LOG FEEL (user: 'freq knob still far far too sensitive' after the 300px pass): root cause was NOT sensitivity — OUT_EQ_Bn_FREQ params are LINEAR 20..20k floats, so the SliderAttachment hands the inspector knob a linear range and everything under 2k sits in the first ~10% of rotation (~66 Hz/px near 250 Hz). Fix is UI-only: after every attachment rebuild in bindInspector(), override the FREQ slider's NormalisableRange (20..20k) + setSkewFactorFromMidPoint(632.5) (geometric mid) — uniform ~30px/octave feel; param/automation/presets untouched. PREVIOUS: v0.4.52 — EQ FEEL PASS (user: knobs too twitchy, HPF/LPF always plain): inspector knob drag sensitivity 140 -> 300 px/full-sweep; Q removed from bands 1+8 everywhere it could be edited — inspector Q knob disabled (dims like GAIN) via inspectorSliders[2].setEnabled(useGain), node vertical-drag Q branch deleted (HPF/LPF drag is frequency-only), mouse-wheel Q gated by bandUsesGain. Q params untouched (DSP frozen, presets keep values). PREVIOUS: v0.4.51 — OUTPUT EQ: MACHINE-TOOL CHART PLATE (user's reference: vintage lathe feed-rate nomogram — cream plate, blue graticule, red curves; picks via mockups: EQ-B pre+post display, K3 CREAM knob). SHIPPED: 4 EQ plates baked (Resources/Plates/eq_hybrid|green_1x|2x from creosote_eq_scene.py --mode plates — exact OutputEqPanel geometry 732x210, cream chart at the graph rect (6,34,494,170), graticule at the graph's OWN log-20-20k / +/-18dB mapping so baked lines land under live curves, DejaVu blue labels, screws). OutputEqPanel: panel bg -> theme+scale-selected plate (UI_THEME aware); EqGraph under kPlates skips bg/grime/grid/labels and draws NOMOGRAM INK — blue dashed PRE (staticPts), red POST 2.2px (livePts), dynamic fill red 0.14 (was purple), band nodes = numbered red silkscreen discs with cream numerals (selection = larger disc + dark ring); EqInspectorKnobLAF gained the K3 CREAM path (cream skirt+cap, black pointer, disabled dims; cyan renderer kept for legacy); inspector labels silk cream DejaVu Bold. All legacy painting intact behind kPlates. VERIFY: EQ tab reads as the chart plate; drag bands (red discs), watch dynamics duck the red curve over the blue dashed pre; knobs cream with black pointers; both themes. OPEN: header buttons/tabs polish vs plate; LIMITER rename.
